name: psychquant-claude-plugins
description: Che Cheng's Claude Code Plugin Marketplace - 學術研究與生產力工具

plugins.name: mcp-tools
plugins.description: MCP Server 開發工具集：mcp-new-app、mcp-deploy、mcp-install、mcp-upgrade、mcp-clone、mcp-publish、mcp-sync、mcp-diagnose、mcp-debug、mcp-test、mcp-to-plugin、mcp-issue

plugins.name: plugin-tools
plugins.description: Claude Code Plugin 完整生命週期工具：plugin-create、plugin-upgrade、plugin-deploy、plugin-update、plugin-health、plugin-debug

plugins.name: issue-driven-dev
plugins.description: Issue-driven development methodology: idd-issue → idd-diagnose → idd-implement → idd-verify → idd-close. Plus idd-comment (template-guided, prose-first) and idd-edit (edit existing comment). SDD as special case via diagnose complexity assessment.

plugins.name: che-apple-mail-mcp
plugins.description: Apple Mail MCP Server — 44 tools, SQLite 毫秒搜尋, .emlx 解析, 批次操作

plugins.name: r-shiny-debugger
plugins.description: 功能測試導向的 R Shiny App Debug 工具，整合 agent-browser 與 R console

plugins.name: che-archive-lines
plugins.description: 歸檔 LINE macOS 聊天記錄到文字檔，使用座標點擊自動化

plugins.name: ai-docs-guide
plugins.description: Auto-triggered Skills for querying Claude Code, OpenAI, Codex CLI, Gemini API, and Gemini CLI documentation. Source-code-first for CLI tools. /ai-docs-guide for cross-platform comparison.

plugins.name: claude-config-guide
plugins.description: [Deprecated — replaced by ai-docs-guide] Claude Code 設定查詢助手

plugins.name: che-things-mcp
plugins.description: Things 3 任務管理 MCP Server - 47 個工具支援完整 GTD 工作流程

plugins.name: che-ical-mcp
plugins.description: macOS 行事曆與提醒事項 MCP Server - EventKit 整合，28 個工具，支援 attendees/organizer、undo/redo、每事件時區、--cli 模式、--setup TCC 授權、彈性日期解析、模糊匹配、batch 操作

plugins.name: che-duckdb-mcp
plugins.description: Swift-native DuckDB MCP — dual-source docs (llms.txt + full) with TF-IDF search + fuzzy function matching, plus 6 local DB tools (14 total). Pinned duckdb-swift, real DuckDB error messages.

plugins.name: che-word-mcp
plugins.description: Word MCP Server - Swift 原生 OOXML 操作，148 個工具，支援 Dual-Mode + Session 狀態管理（dirty tracking, autosave, finalize）

plugins.name: postgresql-guide
plugins.description: Auto-triggered Skill for querying PostgreSQL official documentation

plugins.name: claude-switch
plugins.description: Claude Code 多帳號管理：切換帳號、列出帳號、自動設定 IDE symlink 解決 VS Code 偵測問題

plugins.name: che-xcode-mcp
plugins.description: App Store Connect MCP Server — 99 tools across 15 domain managers covering the full ASC API

plugins.name: che-dropbox-ignore
plugins.description: Dropbox 同步排除管理 — 自動對 .git、build artifacts 等設定 com.dropbox.ignored xattr

plugins.name: che-bot-toolkit
plugins.description: Bot 開發工具集

plugins.name: archive-first
plugins.description: Protect files from AI-assisted deletion — PreToolUse hooks block destructive commands on archived/ paths, toggle with archived-lock/archived-unlock

plugins.name: codex-batch
plugins.description: Batch content generation using Codex CLI (GPT-5.4) — parallel codex exec with large reference docs as context

plugins.name: che-svg-mcp
plugins.description: SVG MCP Server — Swift 原生 XML 操作，33 個工具，Session-based 向量圖形編輯

plugins.name: che-pixel-mcp
plugins.description: Pixel MCP Server — Swift 原生 Core Image 操作，36 個工具，200+ 濾鏡，Session-based 點陣圖形編輯

plugins.name: che-telegram-mcp
plugins.description: Telegram MCP Plugin — 結合 Bot API 與個人帳號 (TDLib)，macOS Keychain 密鑰管理

plugins.name: perspective-writer
plugins.description: Write letters, emails, autobiographies, and formal documents by simulating the writer's authentic voice

plugins.name: che-creative-suite
plugins.description: Creative Suite — 協調 che-svg-mcp（向量）與 che-pixel-mcp（點陣）的圖形處理工作流，含 creative-router skill 與 creative-agent

plugins.name: che-zotero-mcp
plugins.description: Zotero reference manager + academic search + knowledge graph MCP Server

plugins.name: r-docs-guide
plugins.description: Auto-triggered Skills for querying R package documentation via WebFetch. Covers CRAN, tidyverse, Shiny, and general R packages.

plugins.name: che-apple-dev
plugins.description: Apple platform development toolkit — build, deploy, debug, device management, Apple OAuth setup for Xcode projects

plugins.name: tool-finder
plugins.description: 找出任務可用的工具（MCP、Skills、CLI）或搜尋更好的替代方案

plugins.name: safari-browser
plugins.description: macOS native browser automation via Safari + AppleScript — permanent login, upload --native

plugins.name: che-axiom-systems
plugins.description: Axiomatization Systems — 跨領域形式化公理體系的建立、驗證與查詢。基於 ASBE 方法論。axiom-create、axiom-validate、axiom-lookup

plugins.name: lean-prover
plugins.description: Lean 4 automated proof grinding — breadth-first sorry elimination with Mathlib API rules, codex-prove-assist, lean-prover agent, and auto-commit

plugins.name: gifthub
plugins.description: GiftHub CLI integration — auto-detect .gfh.json, inject usage context, auto-install after build

plugins.name: cli-tools
plugins.description: CLI tool lifecycle management — build, deploy, install, upgrade Swift CLI tools via GitHub Releases

plugins.name: parallel-ai-agents
plugins.description: Ensemble 審閱：4 Claude + Codex 交叉比對，支援 independent/hybrid/mix N 三種模式

plugins.name: macdoc
plugins.description: macOS 原生文件處理 CLI — 格式轉換、VLM OCR、SRT 處理
